title: Ensure switch cases end with an unconditional 'break' statement
description: Switch cases should not continue to the next case without an explicit break. This can lead to unexpected behavior.
recommendation: Add a 'break' statement at the end of each switch case.
impact: Improves code readability and reduces the risk of unintended code execution.

checks.message: Add a 'break' statement at the end of each switch case.
